name: DUAT Templates
description:
Synthetic lab templates for DUAT Genesis: scenario cards, falsifier reports and observation notes for public-safe simulation work.

MEDIOEVO Tools is working toward a local-first OS for personal AIs: portable continuity across devices, shared displays, skill packets and future hardware interfaces. DUAT Templates support the scenario/falsifier layer of that plan.

Public plan:
https://medioevo.space/blog/medioevo-tools-plan-maestro.html

What you get:
- DUAT Genesis lab card
- Synthetic scenario brief
- Falsifier report template
- Example synthetic lattice study
- Support notes for keeping claims low-risk and reviewable

What this does not include:
- Private DUAT Geodia engineering
- GEODIA Social Observatory runtime or real datasets
- MEDIOEVO RPG/TCG source, assets, lore or bridge code
- Scientific validation, real-world prediction, diagnosis or decision guarantees
- Private prompts, credentials or local automation state
- A guarantee of autonomous AI safety, hardware delivery or a one-year product timeline

Buyer-safe boundary:
These are templates for synthetic simulation labs. They are not a prediction engine, not a scientific proof pack, not access to the private MEDIOEVO/DUAT runtime and not the future MEDIOEVO OS itself.
excludes: validated science, diagnosis or prediction claims
refund_note: Digital template pack. Refunds follow the store policy when the file cannot be accessed or materially differs from the listing.
